error_signature: updating Google Docs content is challenging
title: Challenges in updating Google Docs content via n8n
symptom: Users find it difficult to update the content of existing Google Docs through the Google Drive node.
applies_when: Attempting to modify existing Google Docs content
not_this_if: Creating a new document instead of updating an existing one
root_cause: The Google Drive node does not support direct content updates for existing Google Docs. Users can only modify metadata or create new documents, which may not meet their needs for in-place editing.
fix_steps: Use the 'Write File' operation to create a modified version of the document.
Upload the modified file to Google Drive as a new document.
For direct content updates, set up an HTTP Request node to use the Google Docs API.
agent_instruction: Use the Google Docs API via an HTTP Request node for direct content updates.
